{{Infobox concept
| name = Violet Light
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

''See also: [[Violet Light Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet]] [[Light]] is a powerful and difficult-to-summon magical force associated with the concept of absolute honesty. It manifests physically as shimmering, paper-thin strips or sheets of purple light that can act like bandages or nets to ensnare creatures, clear obstacles such as ice, or banish entities back to their proper territories to restore global balance. Beyond its physical utility, the [[Violet]] [[Light]] possesses a sentient, communicative quality; it can speak with a cheerful tone or whisper unsettling truths to its user. It functions as an uncompromising moral compass that prioritizes truth above all else, often disregarding human qualities like mercy, compassion, or empathy. As the user [[Alin]] integrates this power into his being, the light becomes an intrinsic part of him, offering blunt observations regarding his character, his loss of humanity, and his likelihood of death.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet]] [[Light]] is a form of light residing within [[Alin]] that communicates with him through sound and questions. This entity functions to restore worldly balance by banishing things back to their original [[Territory]], a process that can be achieved using the light as sheets or by having it fall like a luminescent blanket. The light provides ruthless honesty, capable of showing individuals their own appearance in a mirror-like fashion. While it can be summoned by [[Alin]]'s cry, the entity once informed him that he had lost control.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] is an entity that communicates with [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] corrects the balance of the world by banishing things back to their home [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] is a type of light within [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Violet Light]] is a type of light [[Alin]] hears.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Violet Light]] can be used as sheets to banish objects.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] asks [[Alin]] questions.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Violet Light]] can fall like a luminescent blanket.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] provides ruthless honesty and can show a person their own appearance in a mirror-like way.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet Light]] told [[Alin]] he lost control.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Violet Light]] can be summoned by [[Alin]]'s cry.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
